stemHtml: What is a hazard when operating the auto thrust in SPEED mode?

options.a: The autothrust may exceed operational limitations of the engine(s) if the selected speeds are outside of the normal flight envelope.
options.b: The autothrust may not be able to maintain the selected speed if it is outside the performance capability of the aeroplane.
options.c: Heavy turbulence can cause exceedance of operational limits due to excessive thrust vibrations.
options.d: When operating outside of limits, the autothrottle may disconnect without any warning.
